cards.rules_text:
Bone 1
Whenever you shuffle your discard into your deck, attack 4.

Mind 1
Exert: Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it into your discard. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Soul 1
{1}, Exert, Destroy two Foods you control: Create two Food item tokens with the abilities of both Foods destroyed. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Bone 1
Draw a card.
When you discard this card, draw a card.

Bone 1
Each player discards their hand and draws seven cards.

Mind 1
Each player shuffles their hand and discard into their deck and draws seven cards.

Mind 1
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Food for Thought: Draw a card and gain 1 hunger. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Bone 1
Put target card from your discard on top of your deck.

Blood 1
A player of your choice loses 2 hunger.

Soul 1
Exert: You gain 1 hunger. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Blood 1
Whenever an opponent loses hunger, you may exert a silver you control. If you do, attack 1. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Bone 1
Whenever you discard a card, you may exert a silver you control. If you do, attack 1. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Bone 1
Whenever an opponent discards a card, you draw a card.

Bone 1
{1}, Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Pomegranate, Discard a card: You gain 1 hunger. Draw a card. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Bone 1
Each opponent discards two cards.

Soul 1
Exert any number of followers you control. For each follower exerted this way, attack 2. [i](An exerted permanent won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Mind 1
Whenever an opponent plays a non-action card, it enters with one less endurance counter. This effect can’t reduce the amount of endurance counters it enters with below 1.

Blood 1
When Sacrifice Fodder is destroyed, draw a card.

Soul 1
When Salt is destroyed, you gain 1 hunger.
Obstruct
{2}, Exert: Attack {X}, where X is the number of endurance counters on Shifting Warrior. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Soul 1
If a player would attack, they instead attack for that amount plus 1.

Mind 1
{2}, Exert: Attack 1. If a player loses health from this attack, look at the top card of their library. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Blood 1
Obstruct
When Starvatiomancer enters play or is destroyed, each opponent loses 1 hunger.

Soul 1
Whenever you gain hunger, put an endurance counter on Starving Masses.
Exert, Destroy Starving Masses: Attack {X}, where X is the number of endurance counters on it. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]
Cards you play with X in their mana cost cost {X} less to play, where X is the number of endurance counters on The Shifting One.

Soul 1
Obstruct
{1}, Exert: Attack 1. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Blood 1
Exert, Remove an endurance counter from Vial of Blood: Choose one — [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]
• You gain 1 health.
• Put an endurance counter on a follower you control.

Soul 1
{1}, Exert, Exert X other followers: Attack X. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]

Soul 1
{1}, Exert: Attack 1. [i](An exerted creature won’t untap during your next untap step.)[/i]
